rationale.R1.2: The agent thoroughly engaged with the argument chain, identifying multiple inconsistencies and proposing detailed repairs.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged several uncertainties but did not comprehensively mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly adhered to the scope with only minor drifts.
rationale.RX.4: The output was harm-free except for a minor regression regarding success retention across sub-populations.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but not all minor edits were annotated.
